title: Pammalubos ti cookie
Cookie consent
e602cb0a14375b07effaac0d79fe4df8
aqtv2_en_bandagedclamtombgiftsqkkll_fg2fm8mb2_ftflt_20220628-1854.md
text: Ti Wedingo ket agus-usar ti lokal a pagipempenan a kasapulan para iti awis nga agtignay (panangidulin ti sesion ken dagiti kaykayatmo).
Wedingo uses local storage necessary for the invitation to function (saving your session and preferences).

privacyPolicy: Kontrolador ti datos: Adrián Carrasco López.
termsText: Babaen ti panangusar iti Wedingo awatem dagitoy a kondision.
By using Wedingo you accept these terms.
legalText: Kas maitunos kadagiti maipakat a linteg, maited dagiti sumaganad nga impormasion:
In compliance with applicable laws, the following information is provided:

fileSize: Ti ladawan ket nasurok a 20 MB.
verifyTokenFirst: Beripikar ti access code sakbay nga i-save.
Verify the access code before saving.
acceptPrivacyPolicy: Masapul nga awatem ti Privacy Policy tapno makaaramidka iti imbitasion.
You must accept the Privacy Policy to create the invitation.
usernameRequired: Mangisurat ti username tapno makalog-in inton agangay.
Enter a username so you can log in later.
usernameInvalid: Ti nagan ti agar-aramat ket mabalin laeng nga aglaon kadagiti letra ken numero.
Username can only contain letters and numbers.
usernameTooLong: Ti nagan ti agar-aramat ket saan a mabalin a lumbes iti 50 a karakter.
bothNamesRequired: Isurat ti agpada a nagan tapno maituloy.
dayInvalid: Masapul nga aldaw iti nagbaetan ti 1 ken 31.
hourInvalid: Masapul nga oras iti nagbaetan ti 0 ken 23.
minuteInvalid: Masapul nga adda iti nagbaetan ti 00 ken 59 ti minuto.
dateNotValid: Ti petsa a naiserrek ket saan a balido (e.g. Pebrero 30 ket awan).
The date entered is not valid (e.g. February 30 does not exist).
dateBeforeToday: Saan a mabalin a sakbay ita nga aldaw ti petsa ti kasar.
The wedding date cannot be before today.
yearTooFar: Ti tawen ket saan a mabalin a naladladaw ngem ti {{tawen}}.
The year cannot be later than {{year}}.
sectionOrderInvalid: Saan a balido ti section order.
The section order is not valid.
hiddenSectionsInvalid: Saan a balido dagiti nailemmeng a benneg.
The hidden sections are not valid.
godparentsRequired: No maysa a padrino ti iserrekmo, agpada a kasapulan ti nagan.
If you enter one godparent, both names are required.
coverFirst: Masapul nga umuna a benneg ti akkub.
The cover must be the first section.
menuRequired: Iladawan ti uray maysa laeng a kangrunaan a menu (karne, ikan wenno vegan).
Describe at least one main menu (meat, fish or vegan).
ibanInvalid: Saan a balido ti pormat ti IBAN.
The IBAN format is not valid.
galleryFormatInvalid: Saan a balido ti pormat ti ladawan ti galeria.
The gallery image format is not valid.
sectionOrderMismatch: Ti urnos ti benneg ket addaan kadagiti {{aktual}} a banag, ngem {{expected}} ket ninamnama.
The section order has {{actual}} items, but {{expected}} were expected.
messageTooLong: Ti mensahe ti imbitasion ket saan a mabalin a lumbes iti 500 a karakter.
The invitation message cannot exceed 500 characters.
scheduleTooLong: Ti eskediul ket saan a mabalin a lumbes iti 2000 a karakter.
storyTooLong: Saan a mabalin a lumbes iti 2000 a karakter ti estoria.
giftsTooLong: Ti impormasion ti sagut ket saan a mabalin a lumbes iti 2000 a karakter.
The gift information cannot exceed 2000 characters.
transportTooLong: Ti impormasion ti transportasion ket saan a mabalin a lumbes iti 2000 a karakter.
The transport information cannot exceed 2000 characters.
invalidLink: Saan a balido ti link ti imbitasion.
The invitation link is not valid.
accommodationTooLong: Ti info ti pagdagusan ket saan a mabalin a lumbes iti 2000 a karakter.
menuTextoTooLong: Ti panangiladawan ti menu ket saan a mabalin a lumbes iti 2000 a karakter.
readImageFailed: Saan a mabasa ti file ti ladawan.
Could not read the image file.
imageTooLarge: Dakkel unay ti ladawan uray kalpasan ti pannakakompresion.
The image is too large even after compression.

title: Rekord dagiti aktibidad ti panagproseso (Art. 30 GDPR) .
Record of processing activities (Art. 30 GDPR)
e602cb0a14375b07effaac0d79fe4df8
aqtv2_en_bandagedclamtombgiftsqkkll_fg2fm8mb2_ftflt_20220628-1854.md
updated: Na-update: Hulio 2026. Daytoy a rekord ket mangidokumento kadagiti aktibidad ti panagproseso ti personal a datos idiay Wedingo.
Updated: July 2026. This record documents personal data processing activities in Wedingo.
row1Data: Nagan ti agassawa, petsa, lugar, tema, retrato, musika, menu, benneg
Couple names, date, venue, theme, photos, music, menu, sections
row1Purpose: Mangaramid ken mangpersonal iti imbitasion iti kasar
row2Data: Nagan ti sangaili, timmabuno (wen/saan), panagpili iti menu, allergy, datos ti salun-at
Guest name, attendance (yes/no), menu selection, allergies, health data
row2Purpose: Imanehar ti listaan ​​ti sangaili ken menu
row4Data: Token ti sesion, nagan ti agar-aramat ti admin
row4Purpose: Kontrol ti access iti admin panel
Control access to the admin panel
row5Data: Dagiti tignay ti Superadmin, nausar a token, nabura nga imbitasion
Superadmin actions, used tokens, deleted invitations
internationalText: Ti datos ket naidulin kadagiti serbidor ti Google Cloud iti rehion ti eur3 (Frankfurt, Alemania).
Data is stored on Google Cloud servers in the eur3 region (Frankfurt, Germany).
scc: Dagiti Pagalagadan a Kontraktual a Klausa (SCC) - Panangipatungpal ti Desision 2021/914
dpf: Balangkas ti Kinapribado ti Datos (DPF) EU-US, UK-US ken Switzerland-US
Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US and Switzerland-US
measureEncryption: AES-256-GCM a panagenkripsio kadagiti ladawan ken sensitibo a datos (PBKDF2) .
AES-256-GCM encryption of images and sensitive data (PBKDF2)
measureTls: Koneksyon ti HTTPS (TLS 1.3) iti ballasiw ti sibubukel a plataporma
HTTPS connection (TLS 1.3) across the entire platform
measureFirestore: Dagiti pagannurotan ti seguridad ti Firestore (panangtengngel ti panagserrek a naibatay iti sesion) .
measureStorage: Minimal a lokal a pagipempenan nga addaan laeng iti pammalubos
Minimal local storage with consent only
measureRetention: Patakaran ti panagtalinaed: 12 a bulan kalpasan ti pasamak para iti datos ti sangaili
Retention policy: 12 months post-event for guest data
measureSuperadmin: Superadmin a nasalakniban babaen ti Firebase Authentication + nailemmeng a ruta
Superadmin protected by Firebase Authentication + hidden route

centralAsia: Tengnga nga Asia / Tengnga a Daya

godparentsText: With the blessing of their godparents

golden: Elegant ken naraniag, addaan kadagiti nabalitokan nga aksento.
Elegant and bright, with golden accents.
forest: Natural ken sober nga addaan kadagiti nalukneng a berde.
Natural and sober with soft greens.
rose: Nabara ken nalamuyot, nga addaan kadagiti de rosas a maris.
Warm and delicate, with pink hues.
linen-soft: Nalawag ken neutral, nga addaan iti natalna ken awan patinggana a kaadda.
Light and neutral, with a serene and timeless presence.
blush-pearl: Nalamuyot ken romantiko, nga addaan kadagiti perlas a de rosas a tono.
Soft and romantic, with pearly pink tones.
lavender-mist: Presko ken natalna, nga addaan iti lavender ken mauve a maris.
Fresh and serene, with lavender and mauve hues.
champagne-bubble: Naraniag ken piesta, nga addaan kadagiti nabara a nabalitokan a kinaraniag.
Bright and festive, with warm golden sparkles.
amber-night: Nasipnget ken elegante, nga addaan kadagiti amber ken balitok a highlights.
Dark and elegant, with amber and gold highlights.
onyx-gold: Nauneg ken sopistikado, nga addaan iti nakaro a balitok iti natayengteng a background.
Deep and sophisticated, with intense gold on dark background.
midnight-royal: Natayengteng unay nga asul nga addaan iti nakaro a balitok ken napasnek a kaadda.
Very dark blue with intense gold and solemn presence.
burgundy-velvet: Nabara ken nabalkot, nga addaan iti nalabaga nga arak ken nabalitokan a sparkles.
Warm and enveloping, with red wine and golden sparkles.
sapphire-night: Nauneg nga asul nga addaan iti pirak nga aksento ken natalna a kaadda.
Deep blue with silver accents and serene presence.
emerald-grove: Nauneg a natural a berde nga addaan kadagiti nabalitokan ken elegante a maris.
Deep natural green with golden and elegant hues.
plum-twilight: Nakaro a lila nga addaan iti de rosas ken romantiko a sparkles.
Intense purple with pink and romantic sparkles.
rainbow: Rambak ti nadumaduma nga ayat babaen kadagiti kolor ti balangaw.
Celebration of diverse love with rainbow colors.
trans: Asul, rosas ken puraw kas pammadayaw iti bandera ti trans.
Blue, pink and white in tribute to the trans flag.
nonbinary: Duyaw, puraw, lila ken nangisit para iti saan a binary flag.
Yellow, white, purple and black for the non-binary flag.
lesbian: Kahel, puraw ken rosas ti bandera ti tomboy.
Orange, white and pink of the lesbian flag.
bi: Pink, purpura ken asul ti bi bandera.
Pink, purple and blue of the bi flag.
pan: De rosas, duyaw ken asul ti bandera ti pan.
Pink, yellow and blue of the pan flag.
ace: Nangisit, abuabu, puraw ken lila ti asexual flag.
Black, gray, white and purple of the asexual flag.
